action_ref.content:
{
  "analysis": "Now I can see the structure of the API response. I need to extract the sequence from the first molecule entry (which is the polypeptide). Let me update the script to correctly parse this data.",
  "plan": "Modify the fetch_pdb_sequences.sh script to correctly extract the sequence from the PDB API response and retry fetching the sequences.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > fetch_pdb_sequences.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
echo "" > pdb_sequences.txt
while read pdb_id; do
  echo "Fetching sequence for $pdb_id"
  response=$(curl -s "https://www.ebi.ac.uk/pdbe/api/pdb/entry/molecules/$pdb_id")
  sequence=$(echo "$response" | jq -r ".[\"$(echo $pdb_id | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')\"][0].sequence")
  if [ "$sequence" != "null" ]; then
    echo -e "$pdb_id\t$sequence" >> pdb_sequences.txt
  else
    echo "No sequence found for $pdb_id"
  fi
done < ../pdb_ids.txt
EOF
",
      "duration": 0.5
    }
  ],
  "task_complete": false
}
